description: fila specialises in high-quality sport footwear. The pair showcases the brand's versatility and ensures maximum style and comfort. Make these shoes from fila your item du jour and wear them with jeans and a light hued tee.UpperSynthetic leather upper with stylised synthetic overlays for lightweight comfort Lace-up system for a snug, customised FitPadded tongue and collar for a snug, all-day comfortMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfortFabric footbed for sweat-free wearRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticOutsoleTPR outsole with geometrical lugs strategically placed for absolute grip and traction on indoor and field courtsOutsole reinforced onto the upper as a heel guard for enhanced backfoot protectionshoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
